metadata.notes: Q4_FY2021 income statement and cash flow are DERIVED (full-year 10-K minus 9-month YTD). Q4_FY2022 income statement and cash flow are DERIVED (full-year 10-K minus 9-month YTD). Q4_FY2023 income statement and cash flow are DERIVED (full-year 10-K minus 9-month YTD). Q4_FY2024 income statement and cash flow are DERIVED (full-year 10-K minus 9-month YTD). Q4_FY2025 income statement and cash flow are DERIVED (full-year 10-K minus 9-month YTD).

tags.label: Revenue from Contract with Customer, Excluding Assessed Tax
General and Administrative Expense
tags.reasoning: This is the General and Administrative component of SG&A expenses, though it doesn't include the selling component which may be captured elsewhere

tags.label: Common Stocks, Including Additional Paid in Capital
tags.reasoning: This represents common stock including additional paid-in capital, which is the standard way APIC is reported on balance sheets

tags.label: Proceeds from Debt, Net of Issuance Costs
tags.reasoning: This directly represents proceeds from debt issuance, net of costs, which matches the proceeds from debt metric

tags.label: Repayments of Debt and Lease Obligation
